related_repositories.name: IBM/CBOM
related_repositories.role: Original IBM Research CBOM specification and tooling overview.

related_repositories.name: cbomkit/sonar-cryptography
related_repositories.role: SonarQube source-code detection engine used by CBOMkit.

related_repositories.name: cbomkit/cbomkit-theia
related_repositories.role: Filesystem and container image scanner for certificates, keys, secrets, OpenSSL configuration, and related artifacts.

claim_ko: CBOMkit은 CBOM 생성, 조회, 저장, 정책 검증을 위한 도구 모음이며, 암호자산 탐지는 소스코드, Git 저장소, 파일시스템, 컨테이너 이미지 분석에 기반한다. 패킷 캡처나 네트워크 트래픽 분석 도구로 설명하지 않는다.
supported_scope: Git repository scanning for source-code cryptographic usage
source-code scanning through Sonar Cryptography Plugin

official_evidence.finding: IBM Research lists CBOMkit, Sonar Cryptography Plugin, CBOM Viewer, CBOMkit-theia, and CBOMkit-action as CBOM-related open-source tooling.
CBOMkit describes CBOM generation, viewer, compliance check, and database functions.
Quickstart asks users to enter a Git URL or PURL to generate a CBOM, or upload an existing CBOM.
WebSocket integration initiates CBOM generation through Git repository scanning and reports progress.
Repository scans create a temporary local clone and use CBOMkit-hyperion/Sonar Cryptography Plugin to identify cryptographic usage in source code.
CBOMkit-theia detects cryptographic assets in container images and directories, with commands for `dir` and `image`.
CBOMkit-theia plugins search filesystems for java.security, OpenSSL configuration, X.509 certificates, secrets, and keys.
PQCA describes CBOMkit components as source-code, GitHub Action, web/API/database, and filesystem/container-image tooling.

comparison_guidance.cbomkit_column: CBOM 생성, 시각화, 정책 검증, 소스코드/파일시스템/컨테이너 이미지 기반 자산 탐지는 강점으로 표시한다.
comparison_guidance.our_system_column: 운영 네트워크 Discovery Agent, TLS/SSH/IKE/STARTTLS probe, Host Agent 런타임 수집, 가용성 검사 흐름을 차별점으로 둔다.
comparison_guidance.do_not_claim: CBOMkit을 패킷 캡처, 네트워크 트래픽 분석, live handshake 측정, 가용성 검사 도구로 설명하지 않는다.
